PRICING_STRATEGY_HIGHEST_PROFIT.name: Highest Profit
PRICING_STRATEGY_HIGHEST_PROFIT.description: Maximizes profit margins by taking the highest of market price and low price average
PRICING_STRATEGY_HIGHEST_PROFIT.standardCardFormula: max($0.50, avg(TCG Low Price, TCG Low Price with Shipping), Market Price)

PRICING_STRATEGY_HIGHEST_VOLUME.name: Highest Volume
PRICING_STRATEGY_HIGHEST_VOLUME.description: Optimizes for sales volume by averaging all three price points
PRICING_STRATEGY_HIGHEST_VOLUME.standardCardFormula: max($0.50, avg(TCG Low Price, TCG Low Price with Shipping, Market Price))
